description:
This quiz evaluates foundational and modern CSS proficiency through multiple-choice questions designed to assess whether developers possess resume-ready styling skills. The difficulty is positioned as accessible yet practical, targeting core frontend competencies. Its teaching tone is casual and engaging, using playful language and emojis to encourage self-assessment without intimidation.
Topics: CSS, Modern CSS, Frontend Web Development, Web Styling
Audience: Frontend developers and web development students seeking to validate their styling skills for professional use
